onboarding.headline: Banking that speaks your language
onboarding.subhead: Calm, clear, voice-friendly money — for everyone.

home.quickActions: What would you like to do?

send.choosePay: Choose how you want to pay.
send.qrHint: Point camera at a UPI QR

faqs.a: Tap Send Money, choose a person, enter the amount, then confirm.
Yes. Every transaction uses bank-grade security and is confirmed twice before sending.

faqs.q: What if I make a mistake?
faqs.a: You will see a confirmation screen before any money leaves. You can cancel there.

faqs.q: Can I speak instead of typing?
faqs.a: Yes. Tap the gold mic button and speak in your language.

voice.unsupported: Voice is not available on this device

profile.title: Profile
profile.footerText: Sathi demo · No real money movement · v4

receive.title: Receive money
receive.subhead: Show this QR — anyone with a UPI app can pay you.

step0.title: Welcome to Sathi
step0.text: Hi! I am your voice banking companion Sathi. Let me show you how to use this app!
step0.speak: Hi! I am your voice banking companion Sathi. Let me show you how to use this app!

step1.title: Your Account Balance
step1.text: This is your balance card. Tap the eye icon to view or hide your balance and account details safely.
step1.speak: This is your balance card. Tap the eye icon to view or hide your balance and account details safely.

step2.title: Talk to Sathi
step2.text: This is the Sathi mic button. Tap it and speak in your language to send money, check balance, or pay bills.
step2.speak: This is the Sathi mic button. Tap it and speak in your language to send money, check balance, or pay bills.

step3.title: Quick Actions
step3.text: From here, you can quickly send money, show your QR code, pay bills, or view your transaction history.
step3.speak: From here, you can quickly send money, show your QR code, pay bills, or view your transaction history.
